_PRODUCTION_SSO_NOTE: To enable real Entra ID (Azure AD) SSO for handlers, replace the routes block below with the production snippet that follows.

_PRODUCTION_SSO_SNIPPET_READY_TO_PASTE._NOTE: Then assign the 'claimsHandler' role to authorized users via SWA Role Management, or via the invitation API. Frontend reads the role from /.auth/me — already wired in src/handler/SignIn.jsx.
